'''âv-sh-f''' ('''kavashaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhesusize|rhesusize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhesusize|rhesusize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-sh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kavashaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivashaf|thivashaf]] || [[word:jivashaf|jivashaf]] || [[word:shivashaf|shivashaf]] || [[word:kivashaf|kivashaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvashaf|thuthuvashaf]] || [[word:jujuvashaf|jujuvashaf]] || [[word:shushuvashaf|shushuvashaf]] || [[word:kukuvashaf|kukuvashaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvashaf|thuvashaf]] || [[word:juvashaf|juvashaf]] || [[word:shuvashaf|shuvashaf]] || [[word:kuvashaf|kuvashaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvashaf|thuvashaf]] || [[word:juvashaf|juvashaf]] || [[word:shuvashaf|shuvashaf]] || [[word:kuvashaf|kuvashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevashaf|thevashaf]] || [[word:jevashaf|jevashaf]] || [[word:shevashaf|shevashaf]] || [[word:kevashaf|kevashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovashaf|thothovashaf]] || [[word:jojovashaf|jojovashaf]] || [[word:shoshovashaf|shoshovashaf]] || [[word:kokovashaf|kokovashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovashaf|thovashaf]] || [[word:jovashaf|jovashaf]] || [[word:shovashaf|shovashaf]] || [[word:kovashaf|kovashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovashaf|thovashaf]] || [[word:jovashaf|jovashaf]] || [[word:shovashaf|shovashaf]] || [[word:kovashaf|kovashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvashaf|thĂŠvashaf]] || [[word:jĂŠvashaf|jĂŠvashaf]] || [[word:shĂŠvashaf|shĂŠvashaf]] || [[word:kĂŠvashaf|kĂŠvashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavashaf|thathavashaf]] || [[word:jajavashaf|jajavashaf]] || [[word:shashavashaf|shashavashaf]] || [[word:kakavashaf|kakavashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavashaf|thavashaf]] || [[word:javashaf|javashaf]] || [[word:shavashaf|shavashaf]] || [[word:kavashaf|kavashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavashaf|thavashaf]] || [[word:javashaf|javashaf]] || [[word:shavashaf|shavashaf]] || [[word:kavashaf|kavashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavashaf|shavashaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavashaf|goshavashaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavashaf|gokishavashaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavashafnĂŒ|shavashafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavashafnknĂŒ|goshavashafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavashafnĂŒ|gokishavashafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavashafshĂ«|shavashafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavashafnkshĂ«|goshavashafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavashafshĂ«|gokishavashafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavashafro|shavashafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavashafnkro|goshavashafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavashafro|gokishavashafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavashafmu|shavashafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavashafnkmu|goshavashafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavashafmu|gokishavashafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavashafsher|shavashafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavashafnksher|goshavashafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavashafsher|gokishavashafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavashafng|shavashafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavashafnkng|goshavashafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavashafng|gokishavashafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavashafya|shavashafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavashafnkya|goshavashafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavashafya|gokishavashafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavashafyam|shavashafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavashafnkyam|goshavashafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavashafyam|gokishavashafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavashafnĂŒshĂ«|shavashafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavashafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavashafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavashafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavashafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavashafnĂŒro|shavashafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavashafnknĂŒro|goshavashafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavashafnĂŒro|gokishavashafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavashafnĂŒmu|shavashafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavashafnknĂŒmu|goshavashafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavashafnĂŒmu|gokishavashafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavashafshĂ«nĂŒ|shavashafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavashafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavashafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavashafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavashafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavashafshĂ«ro|shavashafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavashafnkshĂ«ro|goshavashafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavashafshĂ«ro|gokishavashafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavashafshĂ«mu|shavashafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavashafnkshĂ«mu|goshavashafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavashafshĂ«mu|gokishavashafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavashafronĂŒ|shavashafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavashafnkronĂŒ|goshavashafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavashafronĂŒ|gokishavashafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavashafroshĂ«|shavashafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavashafnkroshĂ«|goshavashafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavashafroshĂ«|gokishavashafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavashafromu|shavashafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavashafnkromu|goshavashafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavashafromu|gokishavashafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavashafmunĂŒ|shavashafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavashafnkmunĂŒ|goshavashafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavashafmunĂŒ|gokishavashafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavashafmushĂ«|shavashafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavashafnkmushĂ«|goshavashafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavashafmushĂ«|gokishavashafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavashafmuro|shavashafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavashafnkmuro|goshavashafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavashafmuro|gokishavashafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
